name: Liao Hua (Yuanjian)
page_title: Liao Hua (Yuanjian) 廖化 (元儉) [Yellow Scarves, Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	There is no historical mention of him being in the Yellow Scarves
	Faked his own death to get back to Shu—he wasn’t sent as an envoy to Meng Da to request help

full_text:
Liao Hua (Yuanjian) 廖化 (元儉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liao Hua (廖化), styledYuanjian (元儉), was born in Xiangyang. Officer in service of Shu. Served through the full span of the Shu Kingdom. Liao Hua was affiliated with Yellow Scarves and the Shu Kingdom. Liao Hua lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
